creator: scheidell@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

Do you want to try to upload a patch for this? 
(mkdir /tmp/chouchdb && rsync -av * /tmp/chouchdb) 
edit the files you think need editing. 
diff -bBru /tmp/chouchdb ./ > /tmp/patch.txt 

and upload that patch? that way the maintainer is clear on what you indended to do.
